series_metadata.series_description: Tracks Ohio Attorney General's Office assets being transferred in ownership within the office to monitor and maintain accurate record of assets. Records include, but are not limited to, internal control sheet for assignment, location, serial number, and asset tag number.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years, provided applicable audit reports have been released. ; Paper: Retain 4 fiscal years, provided applicable audit reports have been released. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
